wine_hotels.name: Abadia Retuerta LeDomaine
wine_hotels.address: Monasterio de Santa Maria, 122 Km. 332.5, 47340 Sardon de Duero, Valladolid, Spain
wine_hotels.category: 5-star luxury estate hotel in a restored 12th-century Augustinian abbey
wine_hotels.description: Set within a restored 12th-century Augustinian abbey surrounded by vineyards and woodland in Sardon de Duero. The 30 rooms blend original Romanesque architecture with 21st-century detail. Michelin-starred Refectorio restaurant in the original dining hall; Santuario Wellness spa with grape-therapy treatments. The estate produces pago-classified wines outside the DO Ribera del Duero under the Abadia Retuerta label.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Cellar visits and pago wine tastings; library vintage selection in the cellar lounge; harvest participation September-October; pairing dinners with Refectorio team

wine_hotels.name: Castilla Termal Monasterio de Valbuena
wine_hotels.address: San Bernardo s/n, 47359 Valbuena de Duero, Valladolid, Spain
wine_hotels.category: 5-star Small Luxury Hotels of the World conversion of a 12th-century Cistercian monastery
wine_hotels.description: Converted 12th-century Cistercian monastery adjacent to the Ribera del Duero Golden Mile, declared a National Monument. 79 rooms around original cloisters with stone walls and Gothic arches. Thermal spa of 2,000+ sq m; El Converso restaurant with tasting menus; the hotel's own Converso Tempranillo is an internationally awarded limited production wine. Monks Wine Cellar for tastings.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Converso Tempranillo produced on-estate; DO Ribera del Duero tastings in the Monks Wine Cellar; guided winery visits to nearby estates; Converso Experience tasting package

verified.address_quoted: San Bernardo, Valbuena de Duero, Valladolid

wine_hotels.name: Hotel and Spa Arzuaga
wine_hotels.address: Carretera N-122 Km 325, 47350 Quintanilla de Onesimo, Valladolid, Spain
wine_hotels.category: 4-star estate hotel and spa on the Golden Mile
wine_hotels.description: Wine-estate hotel at Bodegas Arzuaga Navarro on the Golden Mile, surrounded by vineyards with views of the Duero valley. 96 rooms with spa featuring vinotherapy treatments including wine wraps, grape exfoliant and marc massages. Michelin-starred Taller by Amaya Arzuaga on site; adjacent winery offers estate tours and tastings.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Bodegas Arzuaga Navarro estate tours and vertical tastings; wine bar open to hotel guests; harvest participation; vineyard walks with the winemaking team

verified.address_quoted: Carretera N-122, 325, 47350 Quintanilla de Onesimo, Valladolid

wine_hotels.name: AZZ Penafiel Las Claras Hotel and Spa
wine_hotels.address: Plaza Adolfo Munoz Alonso 1, 47300 Penafiel, Valladolid, Spain
wine_hotels.category: 4-star hotel in a restored 17th-century convent in central Penafiel
wine_hotels.description: 17th-century Clarisse convent in the heart of Penafiel, 7 minutes walk from Bodegas Protos and a short walk from Penafiel Castle and the Provincial Wine Museum. 64 rooms; the Conde Lucanor restaurant in the former chapel serves creative Castilian cuisine; winery access package available for nearby estates.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Wine tasting packages with nearby DO Ribera del Duero producers; Conde Lucanor restaurant wine list focuses on Ribera del Duero; cellar visit arrangements

verified.address_quoted: Plaza Adolfo Munoz Alonso, 1, 47300, Penafiel, Spain

wine_hotels.name: LaVida Vino Spa Hotel
wine_hotels.address: Plaza Mayor 1, Torre de Penafiel, 47300 Penafiel, Valladolid, Spain
wine_hotels.category: Rural wine spa hotel in a 17th-century village wine press
wine_hotels.description: Boutique rural hotel in Torre de Penafiel, incorporating the restored 17th-century communal wine press of the village. 17 rooms; vinotherapy spa with jet baths in red wine, grape marc exfoliation and Winemaker's wrap treatments; Guyot restaurant serving regional wine-country cuisine. Located in the Ribera del Duero wine zone.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Vinotherapy spa treatments; Ribera del Duero wine list at the Guyot restaurant; guided estate visits to nearby wineries by arrangement

verified.address_quoted: Plaza Mayor No 1, Torre De Penafiel, Spain

wine_hotels.name: Hotel Finca Torremilanos
wine_hotels.address: Nacional 122 Km. 274, 09400 Aranda de Duero, Burgos, Spain
wine_hotels.category: 4-star estate hotel on a biodynamic winery estate
wine_hotels.description: Estate hotel at Finca Torremilanos in Aranda de Duero, one of the founding wineries of the DO Ribera del Duero. 37 rooms with vineyard views; Torremilanos restaurant on site serving traditional lechazo and creative dishes; biodynamic estate winery tours and tastings. Rates from EUR 100 per night.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Biodynamic estate winery tours and Torremilanos wine tastings; winery releases and vertical dinners for guests; estate walk through the vineyards

verified.address_quoted: Nacional 122, km. 274, 09400 Aranda de Duero, Burgos

wine_hotels.name: Hotel Rural Emina
wine_hotels.address: Calle de la Acena 8, 47359 Valbuena de Duero, Valladolid, Spain
wine_hotels.category: Rural hotel adjacent to Bodega Emina in Valbuena de Duero
wine_hotels.description: Rural hotel in Valbuena de Duero a short drive from the Bodega Emina winery (check-in at the bodega). 17 rooms with free WiFi; buffet breakfast included. Located on the Golden Mile corridor near the Cistercian Valbuena monastery; Bodega Emina wine tourism programme and estate shop within easy access.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Bodega Emina estate wine tourism and tasting programme; guests check in via the winery; wine and art installations at the bodega

verified.address_quoted: Calle De La Acena 8, 47359 Valbuena de Duero, Valladolid

wine_hotels.name: Bodegas Comenge Casa Rural
wine_hotels.address: Camino del Castillo s/n, 47346 Curiel del Duero, Valladolid, Spain
wine_hotels.category: Rural accommodation on the organic Comenge winery estate
wine_hotels.description: Small rural accommodation on the Comenge organic winery estate at the foot of Curiel de Duero castle. Six rooms; winery visit and tasting included in stay; panoramic restaurant with castle views. Picnic-in-the-vineyard and garden barbecue available to guests. A quiet and personal wine estate stay in the heart of the region.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Full estate organic wine programme; winery tours and tasting for guests; picnic and garden experiences; blending session available by request

verified.address_quoted: Camino del Castillo s/n, 47346 Curiel del Duero, Spain

wine_hotels.name: Bodegas Legaris Rural Stay
wine_hotels.address: Ctra. Penafiel-Encinas de Esgueva Km. 2,5, Curiel de Duero, Valladolid, Spain
wine_hotels.category: Winery guest accommodation adjacent to Bodegas Legaris
wine_hotels.description: Guest rooms within the Bodegas Legaris estate in Curiel de Duero. Small number of rooms enables a personal estate experience with access to all winery tour formats including the Barrel to Senses programme. Set among vineyards and medieval castles of the Curiel de Duero valley.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Full access to Legaris winery tour programme including Classic and Barrel to Senses experiences; vertical flight of Legaris range during stay

verified.address_quoted: Ctra. Penafiel-Encinas de Esgueva, Km. 2,5, Curiel de Duero, Valladolid

wine_hotels.name: Bodegas Nabal Rural Accommodation
wine_hotels.address: A1 Highway exit 168, Valle de Nabal, 09370 Gumiel de Izan, Burgos, Spain
wine_hotels.category: Rural accommodation on the Nabal family winery estate
wine_hotels.description: Rustic rural accommodation at the Nabal family winery in Gumiel de Izan, with vineyard valley views. Rooms overlook the estate; morning tastings with the winemaking family included; covered porch wine bar open throughout the stay. Easy access from the A1 motorway.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Morning estate wine tastings; wine bar access; Gumiel de Izan wine village walking access; personalised family-led introduction to the estate's old-vine Tempranillo

wine_hotels.name: Bodegas Felix Callejo Winery Accommodation
wine_hotels.address: Avenida del Cid Km. 16, 09441 Sotillo de la Ribera, Burgos, Spain
wine_hotels.category: Winery-adjacent rural accommodation at the Callejo estate
wine_hotels.description: Small rural accommodation at Bodegas Felix Callejo in Sotillo de la Ribera, allowing in-depth immersion in a family-run single-vineyard Tempranillo estate. Morning winery access and private family-led tastings; estate is producing old-vine parcels from the Sotillo terroir.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Private family-led winery access; old-vine single-parcel tasting programme; harvest participation in October

verified.address_quoted: Avenida del Cid, Km. 16, 09441 Sotillo de la Ribera, Burgos, Espana

wine_hotels.name: Finca Villacreces Rural Accommodation
wine_hotels.address: Carretera Soria (N-122) Km. 322, 47350 Quintanilla de Onesimo, Valladolid, Spain
wine_hotels.category: Rural accommodation on the organic Finca Villacreces estate
wine_hotels.description: Rural accommodation on the 115-hectare Finca Villacreces estate in organic viticulture since 2017. Set between the Duero river and bicentennial pine forest adjacent to Vega Sicilia. E-bike estate tour, vineyard walk and post-ride tasting are available to guests; picnic-in-the-vineyard option.
wine_hotels.wine_program: E-bike estate tour; organic vineyard walk; Pruno and Finca Villacreces tastings; picnic in the pines option

verified.address_quoted: Carretera Soria (N-122) Km. 322, 47350 Quintanilla de Onesimo, Valladolid, Espana
